title: Sequencing update: external-substrate route
body: Shadowed opening a small continuity/plan sequencing pass under claim c1d6aa9d. Scope: repo-continuity, agentic-engineering thread record, external-skills-substrate-learning plan, and napkin. Intent: make the ordering explicit that mandatory P8 remains the active collaboration sequence, token-cost is a ready follow-on lane, and external-substrate learning is a strategic exercise lane unless owner deliberately prioritises it.
